__fixture__.name: entry_sheet_open_local_file_no_review
__fixture__.scenario: Paired with entry_row_open_local_file_start_center.json. The activation resolves to a pure no-op open: a local text file in an already-trusted workspace, no trust delta, no destination write, no runtime attach, no profile retarget. The sheet emits with open_flow_sheet_class = open_local_target_no_review_required and authority_delta = none. The §5 rule 2 elision exception applies — surfaces MAY skip the visual sheet, but the record is still emitted for parity with palette / CLI. Demonstrates §5.1 open_local_target_no_review_required and the per-class allOf clause that pins authority_delta = none.
contract_sections: §5 rule 2 No-op opens may elide the visual sheet
Schema allOf clause pinning authority_delta = none

target_type_disclosure.summary: Single local file. Already-trusted workspace; no review required.

policy_restrictions_disclosure.summary: No trust change. No policy restriction applies to a plain file open.

trust_posture_disclosure.summary: Trust posture is pending in the abstract, but the active workspace is already trusted, so no prompt fires.

fallback_disclosure.summary: Cancel returns to the active workspace.
